get.description:
Get current pilot configuration

Returns:
    dict: Current configuration

post.description:
Update pilot configuration

Args:
    config: New configuration

Returns:
    dict: Status message

get.description:
Get pilot statistics

Returns:
    dict: Current stats (active tasks, pending downloads, disk usage, totals, run times)

Simulate run - returns what would be downloaded/cleaned

Returns:
    dict: Download candidates and cleanup candidates

post.description:
Manually trigger download cycle

Returns:
    dict: Status message

Manually trigger cleanup cycle

Returns:
    dict: Status message

get.description: Return the cached Home media wall snapshot without refreshing M-Team.

获取流量历史数据

Args:
    range: 时间范围，可选值: 1h, 6h, 12h, 24h, 7d, 30d

Returns:
    {
        "range": "24h",
        "aggregation": "5min",
        "data_points": [...]
    }

获取分享率历史数据

Args:
    range: 时间范围，可选值: 1h, 6h, 12h, 24h, 7d, 30d

Returns:
    {
        "range": "24h",
        "data_points": [...],
        "current": 1.23,
        "highest": 1.50,
        "lowest": 1.00,
        "change_24h": 0.05
    }

获取种子列表（带筛选）

Args:
    tag: 标签筛选 ("声呐做种" | "雷达下载" | "PILOT")
    status: 状态筛选 ("downloading" | "seeding" | "paused" | "completed")

Returns:
    {
        "torrents": List[Dict],
        "total_count": int,
        "filtered_count": int
    }

post.description: 从 Free Hunter 下载种子
